_README: Optometry/eyecare broker source registry. Mirrors the accounting TAM rig and dental TDPM broker_codes.json pattern. site_prefix TOM = The Optometry Market (feeds theoptometrymarket.com + theoptometrypracticemarket.com sibling). NEVER collides with dental's TDPM-, veterinary's TVM-, or accounting's TAM-. 'ref_prefix' is the source-scoped broker reference shown muted on cards (e.g. VPG #489479). 'aggregator: true' sources are treated like the blocked aggregators and purged by the normalizer.

rejected_sources._note: Verified live but NOT used, with the honest reason. Documented so a future pass doesn't re-litigate them.
rejected_sources.optometrypracticesales: Duda-built site; only 1 clean 'Collections of $X' parses from the static HTML — the rest of the listing detail is in JS-hydrated Duda blocks that don't paginate. Too thin/unstructured for plain-fetch. Revisit with a headless browser.
rejected_sources.thewilliamsway: thewilliamsway.com/marketplace/ is a WordPress FSBO-support marketplace — 7 of 8 cards carry the 'fsbo' class (owner-listed). FSBO DOCTRINE (JI 2026-07-10, absolute): STEER CLEAR OF FSBOs everywhere. Excluded on principle, not scrapeability.
rejected_sources.cleinman: cleinman.com is primarily consulting/content; the one live optometric-practice detail page found was Calgary, AB (Canada). No dense US listings feed. Skip.
rejected_sources.azoa: azoa.org state-association classifieds — real but ~1-2 truly parseable US entries after nav noise; too thin to justify a dedicated module. Long-tail state AOAs (WA/PA/etc.) are the same. Revisit as a batch if the vertical grows.
rejected_sources.optirova: AGGREGATOR — 'Add your listing' + multi-vertical cross-source IDs. Blocklist pattern. Never scrape.
